'''Chack''' was the name of a saurian quadruped who sniffed out contraband for the [[Eriadu Customs and Immigration]] security forces. This animal was killed by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Arwen Cohl]]'s hired [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] shortly before the [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] attempt on [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] at the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
